overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn featuring the protagonist Aloy traversing a snowy mountain fortress. The character approaches a stone bridge structure, enters through wooden gates, crosses a courtyard with a tall tower, exits through a massive stone gate, and continues into the open snowy wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain approach to stone fortress bridge

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily along the snowy path toward the stone bridge structure

entered.detail: Large stone arch bridge with wooden fortress structure atop rocky cliff
Snow-covered dirt trail winding through rocky terrain
Snow-capped mountain range visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Aloy approaches a massive stone fortress built into a snowy mountainside. The path leads toward a large arch bridge structure, with snow-covered rocks and sparse vegetation lining the trail under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress entrance passage with wooden gates

events.description: passing through the wooden gates into the fortress interior

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking through the wooden gate entrance into the fortress courtyard

entered.detail: Large wooden gates with metal reinforcements, partially open
Tall cylindrical stone tower with glowing orange braziers

segments.scene_description: Aloy passes through the wooden gates into the fortress, moving from the open mountain into a semi-enclosed passage. The stone tower becomes visible to the right as she enters the courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress courtyard with central tower and main exit gate

agents.ego_description: Aloy crossing the courtyard toward the main exit gate, passing the stone tower

entered.detail: Massive stone archway with wooden doors, serving as the fortress exit
High stone defensive walls with crenellations

segments.scene_description: Aloy traverses the open courtyard inside the fortress, with the stone tower now on her left. She approaches the main exit gate, a large stone archway with glowing braziers on either side.

events.description: exiting the fortress through the large stone archway into open wilderness

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking through the main stone gate, leaving the fortress behind

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the fortress through the massive stone gate, transitioning from the enclosed courtyard back to the open mountain wilderness. The fortress structure falls behind as she continues along the snowy path.

agents.ego_description: Aloy continuing along the winding snowy trail away from the fortress into the remote mountains

entered.detail: Open snow-covered mountain landscape with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation
Massive boulders and rock outcroppings covered in snow

segments.scene_description: Aloy journeys deeper into the snowy wilderness, leaving the fortress far behind. The path winds through rocky terrain with snow-covered cliffs and distant mountain peaks visible under the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Aloy travels from the rugged approach of a mountain fortress through its interior and back out into the vast snowy wilderness. It begins on a trail of snow-covered rocks and sparse vegetation, moving toward a massive stone arch bridge built into the mountainside. As she passes through wooden gates, the open landscape shifts into a semi-enclosed passage that opens into a courtyard featuring a prominent stone tower. The scene then progresses toward a large stone archway flanked by glowing braziers, transitioning from the sheltered fortress interior back into the open air. Finally, the camera follows her deeper into the wilderness, leaving the fortress behind as the path winds through rocky terrain and snow-covered cliffs toward distant mountain peaks under a bright sky.
